hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$d=(Get-Location).Path; while($d -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $d '.codex/hooks/stop.ps1')) -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $d 'Backend/.codex/hooks/stop.ps1'))) { $p=Split-Path -Parent $d; if($p -eq $d){$d=$null}else{$d=$p} }; if(-not $d){ throw 'PCS stop hook script not found.' }; $s=Join-Path $d '.codex/hooks/stop.ps1'; if(-not (Test-Path $s)){ $s=Join-Path $d 'Backend/.codex/hooks/stop.ps1' }; & $s"
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$d=(Get-Location).Path; while($d -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $d '.codex/hooks/stop.ps1')) -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $d 'Backend/.codex/hooks/stop.ps1'))) { $p=Split-Path -Parent $d; if($p -eq $d){$d=$null}else{$d=$p} }; if(-not $d){ throw 'PCS stop hook script not found.' }; $s=Join-Path $d '.codex/hooks/stop.ps1'; if(-not (Test-Path $s)){ $s=Join-Path $d 'Backend/.codex/hooks/stop.ps1' }; & $s"
